name: Chile Carnitas
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Dried ground red New Mexican chile
1 pound Boneless pork, trimmed and cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
Serves 6
1. Combine all spices and rub the pork cubes with the mixture.
2. Let the meat marinate at room temperature for 1 hour.
3. Bake the cubes on a rack over a baking sheet for 1 1/2 hours at 250°F, or until the meat is very crisp.
